meta.description_uz: Koreys/Osiyo dramalari (kino-serial) ko'rish uchun production darajasidagi Django SaaS platforma. Crowdfunding (tarjima uchun pul yig'ish), VIP obuna, Coin (ichki valyuta) tizimi, aktyor profillari va Bunny Stream orqali video uzatish.

target_stack.frontend: Django Templates (SSR) + HTMX + Alpine.js + Tailwind CSS (SEO uchun server-side rendering)
target_stack.media_video: Bunny Stream (HLS adaptiv, token-himoyalangan URL, TUS upload)
target_stack.deploy: Docker Compose (web, db, redis, celery, beat, nginx) + CI/CD

meta.instructions_for_agents_uz: Bu fayl drama.uz loyihasini KUCHLI FUNDAMENT ustiga qayta qurish uchun to'liq vazifalar ro'yxati. Har bir task atomik va testlanadigan bo'lishi kerak. Fazalar ketma-ket bajariladi (P0 → P14), lekin faza ichidagi tasklar 'depends_on' ga qarab parallel ketishi mumkin. Har bir task tugaganda: (1) testlar yoziladi va o'tadi, (2) migration toza, (3) mypy/ruff toza, (4) status 'done' ga o'tkaziladi. Eski kod C:/projects/drama-vps da — uni o'chirmang, qayta foydalaning va kuchaytiring.

mavjud: 3 ta app: drama (Movie, Episode, Actor, Genre, Tag, Category, Review, Rating, ActorGift, TopSlider, MovieShots), users (Profile, UserMovieList, TopUpRequest, CryptoTopUpRequest, balance/Coin, XP, premium), funding (FundingProject, FundingContributor — crowdfunding)
Bunny Stream URL generator service (drama/bunny_stream.py) — HLS, direct mp4, thumbnail, preview, embed
Google Cloud Storage CDN (cdn.drama.uz) static/media uchun, rasm WEBP ga siqiladi
Cloudflare + Telegram WebView uchun cookie/CORS sozlamalari
VIP gating + crowdfunding gating mantiqi (11-qismdan himoya) MovieDetailView da
Coin tizimi: TopUp (UZS chek) + Crypto (USDT) admin tasdiq orqali, select_for_update bilan
muammolar_va_yetishmayotgan: DRF UMUMAN YO'Q — REST API mavjud emas (mobil/SPA imkonsiz)
Redis sozlanmagan — settings.py da CACHES yo'q, lekin views.py cache.get_or_set ishlatadi (default LocMemCache — production'da ishlamaydi, har worker alohida kesh)
Celery YO'Q — barcha og'ir ishlar (rasm siqish PIL orqali) save() ichida SINXRON bajariladi → sekin admin, request bloklanadi
Bunny video URL lari TOKEN-HIMOYASIZ — CDN linkni bilgan har kim videoni ko'radi/yuklab oladi (DRM/signed URL yo'q)
Bunny upload QO'LDA — admin Bunny dashboardga kirib yuklab, GUID ni nusxalaydi (avtomatlashtirilmagan)
Sirlar REPODA: drama-key-v2.json (GCS service account), .env qiymatlari — xavfli
Xavfsizlik bo'sh joylari: X_FRAME_OPTIONS='ALLOWALL', parol min_length=3, ACCOUNT_EMAIL_VERIFICATION='none', CSP yo'q, rate-limit yo'q
Docker/CI/CD yo'q, deploy passenger_wsgi (shared hosting) — zaif
Coin balansi bitta PositiveIntegerField — tranzaksiya tarixi/ledger yo'q (audit imkonsiz)
Episode flat tuzilma — Season (fasl) modeli yo'q
Rating IP asosida (foydalanuvchi bahosi UserMovieList.score da alohida, bog'lanmagan)

conventions.code_style: ruff + black + isort, mypy (strict-ish), Google-style docstring
conventions.migrations: Har task o'z migration'i bilan, data migration alohida ajratilgan, reversible
conventions.commits: Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, refactor:, test:, chore:)
conventions.branches: har faza/task uchun feature branch, PR + review
conventions.secrets: Hech qachon repoda emas — .env (gitignore) + production'da secret manager/env

phases.name: Fundament va loyiha gigiyenasi
phases.goal: Production-ready infratuzilma: settings split, sirlarni tozalash, Redis, Celery skeleti, Docker, logging, pre-commit. Busiz qolgan hammasi qum ustiga quriladi.

tasks.title_en: Split settings into base/dev/prod/test
tasks.description_uz: Bitta config/settings.py ni config/settings/{base,dev,prod,test}.py ga bo'lish. django-environ orqali env o'qish. DEBUG, ALLOWED_HOSTS, DATABASES, security har muhitga mos.
acceptance_criteria: config/settings/ paketi yaratilgan, DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE env orqali tanlanadi
dev'da DEBUG=True, console email; prod'da DEBUG=False, strict security
test settings tez (LocMem cache, sqlite yoki tez postgres, migratsiya o'chirilmagan)
manage.py, wsgi, asgi yangilangan, mavjud funksional buzilmagan

tasks.title_en: Remove committed secrets, rotate keys, .gitignore audit
tasks.description_uz: drama-key-v2.json (GCS service account) va boshqa sirlarni repodan o'chirish, git tarixidan tozalash (git filter-repo), yangi kalit generatsiya. GCS credentials env/fayl yo'li orqali, repoga tushmaydi. .gitignore to'liqlash.
acceptance_criteria: Hech qanday .json kalit, .env, parol repoda yo'q
GCS_CREDENTIALS env yo'l yoki JSON-string orqali yuklanadi
SECRET_KEY va barcha kalitlar rotatsiya qilingan

tasks.title_en: Configure Redis as cache + session backend
tasks.title_uz: Redis'ni kesh va sessiya backend qilib sozlash
tasks.description_uz: django-redis o'rnatish, CACHES default = RedisCache. SESSION_ENGINE = cache (yoki cached_db). views.py dagi cache.get_or_set lar endi haqiqiy Redis bilan ishlaydi. Kesh kalitlari uchun prefiks/versiya.
acceptance_criteria: Local va Docker'da Redis ulanishi test qilingan

tasks.title_en: Celery + Beat skeleton wired to Redis
tasks.description_uz: config/celery.py yaratish, Celery app, Redis broker + result backend. django-celery-beat (DB scheduler). Bitta test task (debug_task). worker va beat ishga tushadi.
acceptance_criteria: celery -A config worker va celery -A config beat ishlaydi

tasks.title_en: Structured logging configuration
tasks.description_uz: LOGGING dict: console (dev), JSON formatter (prod), fayl/stdout. django, celery, app loggerlari. WARNING+ alohida. Request ID middleware (ixtiyoriy).
acceptance_criteria: Prod'da JSON log, dev'da o'qiladigan format

tasks.title_en: Dockerize: Dockerfile + docker-compose (web, db, redis, celery, beat, nginx)
tasks.description_uz: Multi-stage Dockerfile (Python 3.12-slim). docker-compose.yml: web (gunicorn/uvicorn), db (postgres16), redis, celery-worker, celery-beat, nginx. .dockerignore. Healthcheck'lar. Hot-reload uchun dev compose.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up bilan to'liq stack ishga tushadi
celery worker+beat alohida konteyner, Redis'ga ulanadi
nginx static/media proxy, gzip, cache header

tasks.title_en: Split & pin requirements (base/dev/prod) + add DRF, Celery, Redis deps
tasks.title_uz: Requirements'ni bo'lish va pin qilish, yangi paketlar
tasks.description_uz: requirements/{base,dev,prod}.txt (yoki pyproject + uv/poetry). Qo'shish: djangorestframework, drf-spectacular, djangorestframework-simplejwt, django-redis, celery, django-celery-beat, django-filter, django-ratelimit, sentry-sdk, pytest, pytest-django, factory_boy, ruff, mypy. Versiyalar pin.
acceptance_criteria: requirements/base.txt prod minimal, dev qo'shimcha test/lint

tasks.title_en: Pre-commit: ruff, black, isort, mypy, django-upgrade
tasks.description_uz: .pre-commit-config.yaml: ruff (lint+format), isort, mypy, django-upgrade, check-yaml, end-of-file-fixer. CI'da ham ishlaydi.
acceptance_criteria: pre-commit run --all-files toza o'tadi (mavjud kod tozalangan)

tasks.title_en: Health check & readiness endpoints
tasks.description_uz: /healthz (liveness) va /readyz (DB+Redis+migratsiya tekshiradi). Docker healthcheck va monitoring uchun.
acceptance_criteria: /readyz DB va Redis ulanishini tekshiradi, muammoda 503

phases.name: Ma'lumotlar modeli va data qatlamini mustahkamlash
phases.goal: Modellarni production'ga moslash: og'ir ishni save()'dan chiqarish, Season strukturasi, watch history, ledger, indekslar, constraint'lar.

tasks.title_en: Move image optimization out of save() into Celery tasks
tasks.title_uz: Rasm siqishni save()'dan Celery task'ga ko'chirish
tasks.description_uz: Hozir Movie/Actor/Profile/Episode .save() ichida PIL bilan sinxron WEBP siqish bor — bu request'ni bloklaydi. Buni post_save signal + Celery task'ga ko'chirish. Yuklangan original saqlanadi, async siqiladi va almashtiriladi.
acceptance_criteria: Admin yuklaganda darhol javob, rasm fonda siqiladi
Mavjud rasmlar uchun backfill management command

tasks.title_en: Introduce Season model for proper series structure
tasks.description_uz: Hozir Episode to'g'ridan Movie'ga bog'langan (flat). Season modeli qo'shish: Movie -> Season -> Episode. Eski episodelar uchun default 'Season 1' data migration. Backward compatible.
acceptance_criteria: Data migration: barcha mavjud episode -> Season 1
Admin va detail view fasllar bo'yicha guruhlaydi

tasks.title_en: Watch history / resume playback model
tasks.description_uz: WatchProgress(user, episode, position_seconds, duration, completed, updated_at). Foydalanuvchi qaysi qismda, qaysi sekundda to'xtaganini saqlaydi. 'Davom ettirish' va 'Ko'rilmoqda' ro'yxati uchun.
acceptance_criteria: API/HTMX endpoint position'ni saqlaydi (throttle qilingan, har 10-15s)

tasks.title_en: Coin wallet ledger (transaction history, double-entry)
tasks.description_uz: Hozir balance bitta int — audit imkonsiz, race xavfi. CoinTransaction(user, amount, type[topup/spend/gift/refund/funding], reference, balance_after, created_at) ledger qo'shish. Balance ledger yig'indisidan hisoblanadi/sinxron. select_for_update + atomic.
acceptance_criteria: CoinTransaction modeli, har coin harakati yoziladi
Balansni o'zgartiruvchi yagona service funksiya (wallet.credit/debit), atomik
Gift, topup, funding shu service orqali o'tadi
Mavjud balanslar uchun migration (opening balance tranzaksiyasi)

tasks.title_en: Unify rating: user ratings + denormalized aggregate recompute task
tasks.title_uz: Reytingni birlashtirish: foydalanuvchi bahosi + agregat qayta hisoblash
tasks.description_uz: Rating (IP asosida) va UserMovieList.score ikki xil. Birlashtirish: foydalanuvchi bahosi asosiy. Movie.average_rating/total_votes denormalizatsiyasini Celery task bilan davriy/signal orqali qayta hisoblash (har save'da emas).
acceptance_criteria: average_rating signal yoki periodic task bilan yangilanadi

tasks.title_en: Movie publish workflow (draft/scheduled/published) + constraints/indexes audit
tasks.title_uz: Kino holati workflow (qoralama/rejalashtirilgan/chop etilgan) + indeks audit
tasks.description_uz: is_draft bool o'rniga status (draft/scheduled/published) + publish_at. Rejalashtirilgan chop etish Celery beat orqali. Barcha tez-tez filtrlangan maydonlarga indeks, CheckConstraint'lar.
acceptance_criteria: Movie.status va publish_at, scheduled -> published task
Indekslar va constraint'lar qo'shilgan, migration reversible

tasks.title_en: Custom AUTH_USER_MODEL decision & (optional) migration
tasks.description_uz: Hozir Django User + Profile. Kelajakdagi moslashuvchanlik uchun custom User (AbstractUser) ni baholash. RISKLI bo'lgani uchun ehtiyotkorlik bilan; agar qilinsa — to'liq data migration rejasi. Aks holda Profile yetarli deb hujjatlashtirish.
acceptance_criteria: Agar migratsiya qilinsa: barcha FK yangilangan, ma'lumot yo'qolmagan, testlar o'tadi

phases.name: DRF REST API qatlami
phases.goal: To'liq versiyalangan REST API: mobil ilova/SPA, integratsiyalar uchun. OpenAPI hujjat, JWT auth, throttling, filtering.

tasks.title_en: Install & configure DRF + drf-spectacular + JWT
tasks.title_uz: DRF + drf-spectacular + JWT o'rnatish va sozlash
tasks.description_uz: DRF base sozlamalari, /api/v1/ namespace, drf-spectacular OpenAPI sxema + Swagger/Redoc UI. simplejwt token (access/refresh) endpointlari. Default pagination, throttle, renderer.

tasks.title_en: Catalog API: movies, seasons, episodes, genres, tags, actors
tasks.title_uz: Katalog API: kinolar, fasllar, qismlar, janrlar, aktyorlar
tasks.description_uz: ReadOnly viewset'lar: MovieViewSet (list/detail), seasons/episodes nested, genres, tags, actors. Serializerlar optimallashtirilgan (select/prefetch). Public, kesh-do'st. Filtering (django-filter): year, genre, country, status.

tasks.title_en: User & interaction API: profile, watchlist, watch-progress, reviews
tasks.title_uz: Foydalanuvchi API: profil, ro'yxat, ko'rish progressi, izohlar
tasks.description_uz: Authenticated endpointlar: profil olish/yangilash, UserMovieList CRUD, WatchProgress saqlash, Review yaratish/list. Permission (egasi yoki admin). Throttle.

tasks.title_en: Secure video playback API (signed Bunny URLs, gating in API)
tasks.title_uz: Xavfsiz video pleyback API (signed Bunny URL, gating)
tasks.description_uz: GET /api/v1/episodes/{id}/playback/ — VIP/funding/free gating tekshiradi, ruxsat bo'lsa qisqa muddatli token-himoyalangan Bunny URL qaytaradi. Ruxsatsiz 403. Bu pleyer (web+mobil) uchun yagona xavfsiz manba.
acceptance_criteria: Gating mantiqi (free 1-10 qism, 11+ VIP/funding) API'da takrorlanadi (yagona service)
Testlar: VIP, funding, free, anonim holatlar

tasks.title_en: API throttling, filtering, search & versioning hardening
tasks.title_uz: API throttle, filter, qidiruv va versiyalashni mustahkamlash
tasks.description_uz: AnonRateThrottle/UserRateThrottle, ScopedThrottle (qidiruv/playback). django-filter to'liq. Search endpoint. Versiyalash strategiyasi hujjatlangan.
acceptance_criteria: Throttle scope'lari sozlangan va test qilingan

phases.name: Celery background jobs va avtomatlashtirish
phases.goal: Barcha og'ir/sekin/davriy ishlarni fonga: rasm siqish, Bunny upload pipeline, bildirishnomalar, agregatsiya, tozalash.

tasks.title_en: Bunny Stream upload pipeline (create video, TUS upload, status poll)
tasks.description_uz: Admin video fayl yuklaganda: Bunny API'da video yaratish (GUID olish), TUS/PUT bilan yuklash, encoding statusini poll qilish — barchasi Celery'da. Tugagach Episode.bunny_video_id avtomatik to'ladi. Qo'lda GUID nusxalash yo'qoladi.
acceptance_criteria: BUNNY_STREAM_API_KEY bilan video create/upload Celery task
Encoding tugaganda bunny_video_id va status avtomatik yangilanadi

tasks.title_en: Bunny webhook handler (encoding finished, thumbnail ready)
tasks.description_uz: Bunny Stream webhook qabul qiluvchi endpoint: video encoding tugaganda statusni yangilaydi, kesh tozalaydi, kerak bo'lsa admin'ga xabar. Imzo/secret bilan tekshiriladi.

tasks.title_en: Async notifications (Telegram + email) via Celery
tasks.description_uz: Telegram bot (admin xabarnoma: yangi topup, funding) va email Celery task orqali. Hozir EMAIL console. Yangi qism chiqdi/funding maqsadga yetdi kabi event'lar.

tasks.title_en: Periodic tasks: trending recompute, expire premium, cleanup stale topups, sitemap warm
tasks.title_uz: Davriy tasklar: trend, premium muddati, eski topup tozalash
tasks.description_uz: Celery Beat: trending_tags qayta hisoblash (context_processor uchun), muddati o'tgan premiumni o'chirish, eski 'pending' topuplarni tozalash/eslatish, sitemap/kesh isitish, rating agregatsiya.
acceptance_criteria: Premium muddati o'tganda is_premium False bo'ladi

phases.name: Bunny Stream video xavfsizligi
phases.goal: Videolarni himoyalash: token-authenticated (signed) URL, referer/IP cheklash, ixtiyoriy DRM. Hozir CDN linklari ochiq.

tasks.title_en: Token-authenticated (signed, expiring) Bunny URLs
tasks.description_uz: Bunny 'Token Authentication' yoqish va URL imzolash (security key + expiry + path/IP). bunny_stream.py ni signed URL beradigan qilib yangilash. Endi CDN linkni bilgan har kim emas, faqat ruxsatli foydalanuvchi ko'radi.
acceptance_criteria: Imzosiz URL Bunny tomonidan rad etiladi (sozlangan)
Eski ochiq URL ishlatuvchi joylar yangilangan

tasks.title_en: Referer/hotlink protection & allowed-origins config
tasks.description_uz: Bunny pull zone'da referer cheklash (faqat drama.uz), hotlink himoyasi. Hujjatlashtirish va sozlama tekshiruvi.

tasks.title_en: Optional DRM (MediaCage) evaluation & toggle for VIP content
tasks.title_uz: Ixtiyoriy DRM (MediaCage) baholash — VIP kontent uchun
tasks.description_uz: VIP/premium kontent uchun Bunny DRM (MediaCage) imkoniyatini baholash va kerak bo'lsa yoqish. Xarajat/murakkablik tahlili.
acceptance_criteria: Agar yoqilsa: VIP videolar DRM bilan, pleyer mos

phases.name: Frontend SSR: HTMX + Alpine.js + Tailwind + SEO
phases.goal: Server-side rendered, tez, SEO-optimal frontend. Alpine.js interaktivlik, HTMX qisman yangilash, mukammal video pleyer, structured data.

tasks.title_en: Integrate Alpine.js + production Tailwind build pipeline
tasks.description_uz: Alpine.js qo'shish (modal, dropdown, tab, pleyer boshqaruvi). Tailwind production build (purge/minify), output.css optimallashtirilgan. base.html da to'g'ri yuklash, defer.
acceptance_criteria: Tailwind production CSS purge qilingan (kichik hajm)

tasks.title_en: Advanced HLS player (hls.js, quality switch, resume, autoplay next)
tasks.title_uz: Ilg'or HLS pleyer (sifat almashtirish, davom ettirish, keyingi qism)
tasks.description_uz: hls.js asosida adaptiv pleyer: sifat tanlash, davom ettirish (WatchProgress), tugaganda keyingi qism avtomatik, klaviatura boshqaruvi, mobil. Playback URL'ni xavfsiz API'dan oladi.
acceptance_criteria: To'xtagan joydan davom etadi, progress saqlanadi

tasks.title_en: HTMX UX: infinite scroll, live search, filter without reload, comments
tasks.title_uz: HTMX UX: cheksiz skroll, jonli qidiruv, reloadsiz filtr
tasks.description_uz: Katalog/explore'da cheksiz skroll (HTMX), live-search dropdown, filtrlar reloadsiz, izohlar HTMX bilan qo'shiladi. Mavjud HTMX kod kuchaytiriladi.
acceptance_criteria: JS-siz ham asosiy funksiya ishlaydi (progressive enhancement)

tasks.title_en: SEO: JSON-LD (VideoObject, TVSeries, BreadcrumbList), OG/Twitter, hreflang
tasks.title_uz: SEO: JSON-LD structured data, Open Graph, hreflang
tasks.description_uz: Har kino/qism sahifasiga JSON-LD (VideoObject/TVSeries), BreadcrumbList; Open Graph + Twitter Card; uz/en uchun hreflang; canonical; meta title/description (modeltranslation keywords mavjud). Google rich results uchun.

tasks.title_en: Sitemap, robots, image/video sitemaps, performance (lazy img, srcset)
tasks.description_uz: Video/image sitemap qo'shish, sitemap index, lastmod. Rasmlarga loading=lazy, responsive srcset, AVIF/WEBP. Core Web Vitals yaxshilash (LCP, CLS).

tasks.title_en: Mobile nav, PWA manifest, accessibility (a11y) pass
tasks.description_uz: Mobil bottom-nav, PWA manifest + service worker (offline shell), a11y (ARIA, fokus, kontrast, klaviatura). Telegram WebView mosligi saqlanadi.

phases.name: Autentifikatsiya va foydalanuvchi tizimi
phases.goal: Xavfsiz auth: email tasdiqlash, kuchli parol, social login (Google/Telegram), brute-force himoya, foydalanuvchi kabineti.

tasks.title_en: Email verification ON + strong password policy + login rate-limit
tasks.title_uz: Email tasdiqlash + kuchli parol + login rate-limit
tasks.description_uz: ACCOUNT_EMAIL_VERIFICATION 'none' -> 'mandatory' (yoki optional + tasdiqlangan belgisi). Parol min_length 3 -> 8 + validatorlar. django-ratelimit/allauth bilan login urinishlarini cheklash.
acceptance_criteria: Parol siyosati kuchaytirilgan (min 8 + umumiy parol bloki)

tasks.title_en: Social login: Google + Telegram login
tasks.description_uz: allauth socialaccount: Google OAuth. Telegram Login Widget/Mini App auth (telegram_id mavjud) bilan bog'lash. Mavjud Telegram WebView konteksti hisobga olinadi.

tasks.title_en: User dashboard: continue watching, watchlist, history, notifications
tasks.title_uz: Foydalanuvchi kabineti: davom ettirish, ro'yxat, tarix, bildirishnomalar
tasks.description_uz: Profil sahifasini kuchaytirish: 'Davom ettirish', watchlist statuslar bo'yicha, ko'rish tarixi, Coin tarixi, bildirishnomalar markazi. Mavjud profile/settings shablonlari asosida.

phases.name: Monetizatsiya: obuna, Coin, crowdfunding, to'lov
phases.goal: To'liq SaaS billing: VIP obuna rejalari, ishonchli Coin hamyon, crowdfunding, real to'lov shlyuzlari (Payme/Click/crypto) + webhook.

tasks.title_en: Subscription plans & VIP tiers model
tasks.title_uz: Obuna rejalari va VIP darajalar modeli
tasks.description_uz: SubscriptionPlan(name, price, duration, perks) va Subscription(user, plan, start, end, status, auto_renew). Hozir is_premium/premium_until bool — buni reja asosli tizimga ko'tarish.

tasks.title_en: Payment gateway integration: Payme/Click (UZ) + webhooks
tasks.description_uz: O'zbekiston to'lov tizimlari (Payme/Click) integratsiyasi: obuna/Coin sotib olish. Provider webhook'lari (to'lov tasdig'i) -> Coin/obuna avtomatik. Qo'lda chek (TopUpRequest) zaxira variant sifatida qoladi.

tasks.title_en: Crypto top-up automation (replace manual screenshot)
tasks.description_uz: CryptoTopUpRequest hozir qo'lda skrinshot + admin tasdiq. Imkon bo'lsa on-chain tekshiruv/provider (masalan, har manzilga unik memo) bilan avtomatlashtirish. Aks holda jarayonni xavfsizlashtirib qoldirish.
acceptance_criteria: Avtomatik tasdiqlash yoki xavfsizroq qo'lda jarayon

tasks.title_en: Crowdfunding flow hardening (atomic contribute, access, refunds)
tasks.title_uz: Crowdfunding oqimini mustahkamlash (atomik hissa, ruxsat, qaytarish)
tasks.description_uz: FundingProject/Contributor: hissa qo'shish atomik (ledger orqali Coin yechiladi), collected_amount yangilanadi, access beriladi. Maqsadga yetganda status o'zgaradi + bildirishnoma. Bekor bo'lsa refund mantiqi.

phases.name: Qidiruv va discovery
phases.goal: Kuchli qidiruv (PostgreSQL FTS/trigram), tavsiyalar, faceted filter, autocomplete.

tasks.title_en: PostgreSQL full-text search + trigram fuzzy search
tasks.description_uz: icontains o'rniga SearchVector/SearchRank + pg_trgm (xato yozuvga bardosh). title, original_title, description, aktyorlar bo'yicha. SearchVectorField + GIN indeks, signal/Celery bilan yangilanadi. uz/en.

tasks.title_en: Recommendations: similar, trending, 'because you watched'
tasks.description_uz: Teg/janr asosida o'xshashlar (mavjud), trenddagi (ko'rishlar/baholar), ko'rish tarixiga asoslangan tavsiyalar. Celery'da oldindan hisoblab keshlash.
acceptance_criteria: Bosh sahifa: trend, yangi, davom ettirish, tavsiya bloklari

tasks.title_en: Faceted filters & sorting + autocomplete
tasks.description_uz: Explore'da janr/yil/davlat/reyting facet (har facet uchun son), saralash (yangi/reyting/mashhur), qidiruv autocomplete.

phases.name: Performans va keshlash
phases.goal: Redis keshlash strategiyasi, kesh invalidatsiyasi, DB optimizatsiya, CDN header, sahifalash.

tasks.title_en: Caching strategy: per-view, fragment, low-level + invalidation signals
tasks.title_uz: Keshlash strategiyasi: view, fragment, low-level + invalidatsiya
tasks.description_uz: Bosh sahifa, katalog, detail uchun kesh (anonim uchun agressiv). Template fragment cache. Movie/Episode o'zgarganda post_save signal bilan tegishli keshni invalidatsiya (hozir 86400s muddat — eskirgan ma'lumot xavfi).
acceptance_criteria: Kontent o'zgarsa kesh darhol invalidatsiya bo'ladi (eskirmaydi)

tasks.title_en: DB query optimization audit (select/prefetch, indexes, assertNumQueries)
tasks.description_uz: Barcha asosiy view/API'da select_related/prefetch_related auditi, N+1 yo'q qilish, indekslarni EXPLAIN bilan tekshirish. Testlarda assertNumQueries. django-debug-toolbar (dev).
acceptance_criteria: Asosiy sahifalarda N+1 yo'q (assertNumQueries bilan qotirilgan)
Detail/list so'rov soni cheklangan va doimiy

tasks.title_en: CDN cache headers, pagination (cursor), pgbouncer
tasks.title_uz: CDN cache header, cursor pagination, pgbouncer
tasks.description_uz: Static/media uchun uzoq cache header (immutable). Katta ro'yxatlar uchun cursor pagination (API). PgBouncer ulanish puli (prod). nginx gzip/brotli.
acceptance_criteria: Static immutable cache, media mos header

phases.name: Xavfsizlik (Security hardening)
phases.goal: Production xavfsizlik: header/CSP, sirlar, rate-limit, upload validatsiya, audit log, admin 2FA, GDPR.

tasks.title_en: Security headers & CSP (fix X_FRAME_OPTIONS=ALLOWALL)
tasks.title_uz: Xavfsizlik headerlari va CSP (ALLOWALL ni tuzatish)
tasks.description_uz: X_FRAME_OPTIONS='ALLOWALL' xavfli — faqat Telegram uchun aniq ruxsat. django-csp bilan Content-Security-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Referrer-Policy. Telegram WebView mosligi saqlanadi.

tasks.title_en: Rate limiting (login, API, search, reviews, gifts)
tasks.title_uz: Rate limiting (login, API, qidiruv, izoh, sovg'a)
tasks.description_uz: django-ratelimit (web) + DRF throttle (API). Login, ro'yxatdan o'tish, qidiruv, izoh, sovg'a yuborish, topup'ni cheklash. Abuse himoyasi.

tasks.title_en: File upload validation (type, size, image bomb, malware)
tasks.description_uz: Avatar/poster/chek/video yuklashda: MIME va kengaytma tekshiruvi (haqiqiy content), hajm chegarasi, dekompressiya-bomba himoyasi (PIL), nomlarni tozalash. Chek rasmlari xavfsiz saqlanadi.
acceptance_criteria: Faqat ruxsat etilgan turlar, soxta kengaytma rad

tasks.title_en: Admin 2FA, audit logging, dependency & secret scanning in CI
tasks.title_uz: Admin 2FA, audit log, CI'da dependency/secret skan
tasks.description_uz: Admin uchun 2FA (django-otp). Muhim amallar audit logi (kim, nima, qachon). CI'da pip-audit/safety + gitleaks (secret skan).
acceptance_criteria: Audit log (topup tasdiq, kontent o'zgarishi) yoziladi
CI zaif paket/sirni topsa fail bo'ladi

tasks.title_en: GDPR/data privacy: export & delete account
tasks.title_uz: Maxfiylik: ma'lumot eksport va hisobni o'chirish
tasks.description_uz: Foydalanuvchi o'z ma'lumotini eksport qilishi va hisobni o'chirishi (yoki anonimlashtirish). Maxfiylik siyosati sahifasi.

phases.name: Testlar
phases.goal: Ishonchli test bazasi: unit, API, integratsiya, E2E. CI gate coverage >= 80%.

tasks.title_en: pytest + pytest-django + factory_boy setup, coverage gate
tasks.description_uz: pytest infratuzilma, conftest, factory_boy fabrikalari (Movie, Episode, User, Profile, FundingProject...), coverage konfiguratsiya, test settings (tez).
acceptance_criteria: coverage hisoboti, gate >= 80% (boshlang'ich pastroq, oshib boradi)

tasks.title_en: Unit tests: models, services (wallet, playback gating, funding)
tasks.title_uz: Unit testlar: modellar, servislar (wallet, gating, funding)
tasks.description_uz: Kritik mantiq: Coin wallet (credit/debit/race), VIP/funding gating, crowdfunding hissa, premium muddati, rating agregatsiya, image task. Edge case'lar.

tasks.title_en: API tests (auth, permissions, playback, throttle)
tasks.description_uz: DRF endpointlari: JWT auth, permission (egasi/admin), playback gating 403/200, throttle 429, filtering/pagination.

tasks.title_en: E2E (Playwright): register, watch (gating), subscribe, fund
tasks.description_uz: Kritik foydalanuvchi oqimlari: ro'yxatdan o'tish, kino topish, free qism ko'rish, VIP gate, obuna sotib olish (sandbox), funding hissa, davom ettirish.

phases.name: Kuzatuv (Observability) va monitoring
phases.goal: Sentry xato kuzatuvi, metrikalar, uptime, performance APM.

tasks.title_en: Sentry error tracking (web + Celery)
tasks.description_uz: sentry-sdk Django + Celery integratsiyasi, environment/release tegi, PII filtrlash, performance trace namunasi.

tasks.title_en: Metrics & uptime: Prometheus/health, alerting
tasks.description_uz: django-prometheus yoki metrik endpoint (request, DB, Celery queue). Uptime monitor (healthz). Asosiy alert (xato darajasi, queue backlog).

phases.name: DevOps: CI/CD va deployment
phases.goal: Avtomatlashtirilgan lint/test/build, ishonchli deploy, migratsiya, backup, staging. Passenger'dan zamonaviy stack'ga o'tish.

tasks.title_en: CI pipeline: lint, type-check, test, build (GitHub Actions)
tasks.title_uz: CI pipeline: lint, mypy, test, build
tasks.description_uz: GitHub Actions: ruff+mypy, pytest (postgres+redis service), coverage gate, Docker build, drf-spectacular sxema validatsiya. PR'da majburiy.

tasks.title_en: CD: zero-downtime deploy, migrations, collectstatic, rollback
tasks.description_uz: Deploy avtomatlashtirish (compose/registry). Migratsiya xavfsiz tartibi, collectstatic, healthcheck'dan keyin trafik. Rollback rejasi. Passenger o'rniga gunicorn/uvicorn + nginx.

tasks.title_en: Backups (DB + media) & restore drill, staging env
tasks.title_uz: Backup (DB + media) va tiklash mashqi, staging muhit
tasks.description_uz: PostgreSQL avtomatik backup (pg_dump/WAL), GCS media versiyalash, tiklash mashqi (drill) hujjatlangan. Staging muhit (prod'ga o'xshash) deploy oldidan sinov uchun.
acceptance_criteria: Avtomatik kunlik DB backup + saqlash siyosati

phases.name: Admin va kontent boshqaruvi
phases.goal: Kontent jamoasi uchun samarali admin: Bunny upload, scheduling, moderatsiya, analitika.

tasks.title_en: Admin: direct Bunny upload + encoding status UI
tasks.title_uz: Admin: to'g'ridan Bunny upload + encoding status
tasks.description_uz: Unfold admin'da Episode/Movie uchun video faylni to'g'ridan yuklash, encoding statusini ko'rsatish (P3-T1 pipeline'iga ulangan). Qo'lda GUID kiritish yo'qoladi.

tasks.title_en: Content scheduling, bulk actions, draft preview
tasks.title_uz: Kontent rejalashtirish, bulk amallar, qoralama ko'rish
tasks.description_uz: Rejalashtirilgan chop etish (publish_at), bulk actions (chop et/yashir/teg qo'sh), admin uchun qoralama preview (saytda).

tasks.title_en: Review/comment moderation queue
tasks.description_uz: Izohlar moderatsiyasi: flag/report, navbat, spam filtri, ban. Hozir faqat admin reply yozadi — moderatsiya qo'shish.

tasks.title_en: Admin analytics dashboard (views, revenue, funding, top content)
tasks.description_uz: Unfold dashboard: kunlik ko'rishlar, daromad (obuna/Coin), funding progress, top kinolar/aktyorlar, yangi foydalanuvchilar. Keshlangan agregatlar.

summary.critical_path_uz: P0 (fundament) → P1 (model) → P2 (API) + P3 (Celery) + P4 (Bunny xavfsizlik) parallel → P5 (frontend) → P7 (monetizatsiya) → P11 (test) + P13 (CI/CD). Xavfsizlik (P10) va performans (P9) ko'ndalang davom etadi.
eng_muhim_birinchi_5_uz: P0-T2: Repodagi sirlarni o'chirish (drama-key-v2.json) — DARHOL, xavfsizlik teshigi
P0-T3: Redis kesh — hozir kesh aslida ishlamayapti (production'da buzuq)
P4-T1: Bunny videolarni token bilan himoyalash — hozir hamma yuklab oladi
P0-T4 + P1-T1: Celery + rasm siqishni async qilish — admin sekinligini hal qiladi
P0-T1: Settings split — qolgan hammasi shunga tayanadi
summary.eslatma_uz: Bu reja eski C:/projects/drama-vps kodini QAYTA ISHLATADI va kuchaytiradi — noldan yozish emas. Mavjud biznes-mantiq (gating, funding, Coin, Bunny URL generator, modeltranslation, SEO) saqlanadi va production darajasiga ko'tariladi.
